examples: Objective to study the effects of the field-dependent cognitive style on optokinetic illusion.
Methods83 patients with VBI and 57 healthy controls were tested with electronystagmogram instrument, include saccade test, Eye Tracking Test (ETT) and optokinetic test(OKN).
The results of optokinetic nystagmus (OKN) and eye tracking test (ETT) in 28 normal persons, 10 cases with peripheral vestibular lesion and 31 cases with intracranial lesion are analysed.
